subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Alí! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee even as He mentioned thee before. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی یذکرک المظلوم کما ذکرک من قبل انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @exhortations and counsels
